text.name: for the Gulf's most ambitious operators.
We pair clean accounting with the FP&A founders actually run on forecasts, scenarios, unit economics. Never bookkeeping for its own sake.
GCC operators · $0.5M–$5M revenue · D2C, Manufacturing, Healthcare & Logistics.
More than accounting. A finance partner for growth.
“They rebuilt our reporting and gave us a forecast we finally trust — we can see what's coming and plan for it.”
“Our monthly close went from three weeks to three days, and the numbers finally make sense to the whole team.”
“They cleared two years of backlog and set up reporting we now run the business on.”
The gaps that stall growth and how we close them.
Accurate books and organized financial records
Clear monthly reporting and performance insights
Strategic finance guidance without full-time overhead
Support for finance compliance and reporting
Resolve backlogs and fix reporting issues
FP&A & STRATEGIC FINANCE — WHERE WE LEAD
Built for the way you actually run things.
Deep understanding of regional business needs, VAT, UAE Corporate Tax, and GCC market realities.
Clear, actionable advice. Finance that moves your business forward — not just compliance.
Monthly retainer or project-based. Services tailored to your business size and goals.
Finance support that helps you make better decisions — not just record what already happened.
Professional and responsive. You always know where your numbers stand.
Professional and responsive. You always know where your numbers stand.
A simple, structured way to get started.
We understand your business and finance needs. No pitch, just a conversation.
We recommend the right services and engagement model for your stage and goals.
We align systems, reporting structure, and processes — clean and ready from day one.
Continuous finance and accounting support with regular reporting and clear communication.
What size businesses do you work with?
We support SMEs, growing startups, and established businesses across the GCC.
Can you work with our existing accountant?
Yes. We can collaborate with your current accountant or finance team.
Yes. We support both ongoing monthly engagements and project-based work.
What accounting systems do you support?
We work with major accounting platforms and finance tools.
How do you price your services?
Pricing depends on scope, business size, and required support.
Do you provide strategic finance support?
Yes. Our Fractional CFO services help businesses with planning and decision-making.
Ready to simplify your finance operations?
Let's discuss how Frontier Quotient can support your business growth.
We know the numbers that move your industry.
Inventory, margins, and cash flow visibility
Costing, COGS, and margin by product line
Cash flow across long payment cycles
Strategic finance for the Gulf's operators.
We built the FP&A partner we wished we'd had.
FRONTIERS ARE PUSHED · SUCCESS IS MEASURED
Finance clarity for growing businesses in the GCC.
Strategic finance for the Gulf's operators.

Serious business finance has always been a luxury of scale. The FP&A talent that turns numbers into strategy usually sits inside large multinationals, the Unilevers and P&Gs of the world because only they can afford to keep it in-house. Smaller businesses go without it, not for lack of need, but because that talent is priced out of reach. Frontier Quotient changes that. We democratize high-end FP&A and business finance giving growing companies the same financial muscle the biggest players run on, sized and priced for where you are today.
To give every growing business the financial clarity and foresight once reserved for the world's largest companies, so they can make sharper decisions and grow with confidence.
And to build a finance partner worth keeping one held to the standard of the firms we benchmark against, that gets measurably sharper with every engagement.
And if it won't move your numbers, we'll tell you we're not the right fit.
The finance firepower a Unilever runs on — priced for a business like yours.
If we can't show the impact on your numbers, we haven't earned the work.
You'll always know exactly where you stand — in plain words, not finance-speak.
We'd rather lose the work than oversell it. Good advice beats a comfortable retainer.
Ready to simplify your finance operations?
Let's discuss how Frontier Quotient can support your business growth.
Frontier Quotient combines accounting expertise with practical finance strategy to help companies operate with clarity and confidence.
Strategic finance for the Gulf's operators.
Ready to simplify your finance operations?
Let’s discuss how Frontier Quotient can support your business growth.
Businesses that trust us with their numbers
Finance clarity for growing businesses in the GCC.
Strategic finance for the Gulf's operators.
We make onboarding and finance management clear and efficient.
Understand business challenges and finance needs
Review current finance setup and gaps
Deliver continuous reporting and finance support
Ready to simplify your finance operations?
Let's discuss how Frontier Quotient can support your business growth.
Finance built for type of business.
We don't believe in generic finance support. Every industry has its own financial reality — and we work with yours.
We work across many sectors. Tell us about your business and we'll let you know how we can help.
Working capital tied up in inventory
Working-capital and margin clarity for product brands.
D2C and CPG brands juggle inventory, multi-channel sales, and thin margins. We build finance systems that reveal true unit economics and free up cash tied in stock.
How we helped a D2C brand optimise their working capital by 50%
Cash flow gaps between sale and settlement
Retail and e-commerce businesses face multi-platform revenue, inventory management, high return rates, and cash flow tied up in stock. We give you real visibility into what's actually profitable.
How we gave a retail group real-time visibility into product margins
Compliance-ready finance for clinics and care providers.
Healthcare operators balance patient volumes, payer cycles, and strict compliance. We structure reporting and cash flow so leadership can focus on care, not spreadsheets.
How we streamlined month-end close for a multi-clinic group
Cost, inventory, and margin control for producers.
Manufacturers live and die by cost accuracy. We bring structure to COGS, inventory, and production costing so you know the true margin on every product line.
How we rebuilt product-level costing for a GCC manufacturer
Cash flow across long payment cycles
Cash flow and operational finance for asset-heavy operations.
Logistics and supply-chain businesses run on tight margins and heavy assets. We keep cash flow, receivables, and operating costs under control so you can scale without surprises.
How we tightened receivables and cash flow for a logistics operator
Construction and real estate businesses manage long project cycles, retentions, and complex costs. We build project-level reporting and cash flow control so every job stays profitable.
How we brought project-level profitability into focus for a developer
Strategic finance for the Gulf's operators.
Practical finance and accounting insights for GCC business owners, founders, and finance leads.
What UAE Corporate Tax means for a business doing $1M–$5M in revenue.
UAE Corporate Tax landed in June 2023. If you're operating between $500K and $5M in revenue, here's exactly what changes, what doesn't, and what you need to do before your next financial year.
How should a GCC business structure its monthly close?
Most businesses close their books in 3 weeks. Here's how the best ones do it in 5 days — and what they look at first.
When should a founder stop doing their own bookkeeping?
The answer isn't a revenue number. It's a decision quality question — and most founders wait 12 months too long.
What is a Fractional CFO and does your business need one?
A Fractional CFO isn't just a part-time finance director. Here's what they actually do — and when the investment pays off.
KSA VAT and ZATCA e-invoicing: a practical guide for SMEs.
Saudi Arabia's e-invoicing mandate (ZATCA) applies to most businesses now. What you need to know and do before penalties hit.
How to prepare your books for a Series A investor conversation.
Investors ask for data rooms. Most founders aren't ready. Here's exactly what finance documents you need — and how to clean them up fast.
Retail cash flow: why your P&L looks great but your bank is empty.
Revenue is vanity, cash is sanity. Retail and e-commerce businesses face a specific cash timing problem. Here's how to model it.
Strategic finance for the Gulf's operators.
Client names kept confidential. Outcomes, numbers, and timelines are real.
Ready to write your own outcome?
Let's discuss how Frontier Quotient can support your business growth.
Strategic finance for the Gulf's operators.
A multi-platform D2C operator in UAE with no clear month-end process. Books were 3 months behind. No P&L visibility.
Management now reviews financials every Friday. Cash position tracked in real time.
A construction business in KSA with project-level reporting gaps. No WIP accounting. Margin bleeding invisibly.
Identified 3 projects losing money. Repriced 2. Exited 1. Gross margin expanded +600bps.
A health-tech startup preparing for seed round. Books messy. No financial model. Investors asking for data room.
Closed $1.4M seed round. Investor cited financial clarity as a key factor in decision.
A logistics company in Bahrain with a 67-day cash conversion cycle. Supplier terms misaligned with receivables.
Cash cycle reduced to 41 days. Working capital freed up by $800K.
A consultancy in Dubai with 12 staff and no utilization tracking. Headcount growing but margins flat.
Identified 4 underperforming client accounts. Repriced or exited. Profit per head up 32%.
An e-commerce business that had never filed VAT correctly. 2 years of messy books. UAE CT deadline approaching.
Fully compliant. No penalties. Clean books handed to ongoing accounting team.
Whether you need bookkeeping, reporting, or strategic finance support, our team is ready to help.
Select a service — Bookkeeping / Reporting / Cash Flow / Fractional CFO / VAT...
Tell us about your business, current challenges, and the type of support you're looking for...
Two core markets, anchored by our UAE office, with active coverage across the wider region.
No. Monthly retainers and one-time projects available.
Do you work outside the GCC?
Our focus is GCC-based businesses. Reach out to discuss.
What happens after I get in touch?
We set up a short intro call to understand your goals and scope the work.
Yes. The discovery call is complimentary, with no obligation.
Typically within a week of agreeing on scope and terms.
Strategic finance for the Gulf's operators.
